task_completion.description: The agent opens the world_survey project in the QField application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QField app is open, displaying the 'world_survey' project map or project selection screen.

task_completion.description: The agent locates and selects the capital point in France (originally 'Target_Alpha').
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map is focused on France, and the capital point is selected, or its feature attribute form is opened showing the name 'Target_Alpha'.

task_completion.description: The agent updates the name of the capital in France to 'Paris'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute form for the France capital shows the name field being edited to 'Paris', or the map displays the updated label 'Paris' over France.

task_completion.description: The agent locates and selects the capital point in Japan (originally 'Target_Bravo').
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map is focused on Japan, and the capital point is selected, or its feature attribute form is opened showing the name 'Target_Bravo'.

task_completion.description: The agent updates the name of the capital in Japan to 'Tokyo'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute form for the Japan capital shows the name field being edited to 'Tokyo', or the map displays the updated label 'Tokyo' over Japan.

task_completion.description: The agent locates and selects the capital point in Australia (originally 'Target_Charlie').
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map is focused on Australia, and the capital point is selected, or its feature attribute form is opened showing the name 'Target_Charlie'.

task_completion.description: The agent updates the name of the capital in Australia to 'Canberra'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute form for the Australia capital shows the name field being edited to 'Canberra', or the map displays the updated label 'Canberra' over Australia.

integrity.description: The agent used the QField graphical user interface to navigate the map and edit attributes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the QField app interface being used, including map panning, zooming, and attribute forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal emulator or sqlite3 command-line tool to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of a terminal app executing SQL UPDATE commands on the world_survey.gpkg file.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor or notes app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The edits are made strictly within the QField application's feature attribute forms, not in a separate text-based application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the world_survey.gpkg database using the QField app. The corrupted names are 'Target_Alpha' (located in France), 'Target_Bravo' (located in Japan), and 'Target_Charlie' (located in Australia). The agent must restore these to 'Paris', 'Tokyo', and 'Canberra' respectively. Verification should confirm these specific name changes in the attribute forms or map labels within QField.
